title: Integration-sprint test results
description: Summary at .scrum/test-results.json. Records one TestCategory per test suite run during the Integration Sprint: the smoke-test skill writes the regression categories, and the integration-tests skill writes integration_api / integration_ui / design_coverage / manual_probe, plus a recomputed overall_status. Writes go exclusively through scripts/scrum/record-test-result.sh; direct edits are blocked by pre-tool-use-scrum-state-guard.sh. Read by completion-gate.sh (integration_sprint exit criterion + uat_release regression check), append-po-decision.sh (release_decision=go gate), the po-acceptance skill (UAT gate), and the Textual dashboard.

name.description: TestCategory name (e.g. unit, e2e, integration, smoke, browser, integration_api, integration_ui, design_coverage, manual_probe). Unique within categories; a re-run replaces the same-named entry.

runner_command.description: Command line used to run the suite, or 'none detected' when skipped.

errors.description: Up to 10 failure details for this category.

overall_status.description: Recomputed on every record: any failed category -> failed; else any skipped -> passed_with_skips; else passed. 'running' is the pre-first-record transient.
